OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Gary Louie; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/JIRoque; Not Reported. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
Attorney, Daniel Piccinini, representing and appearing on behalf of the plaintiff.

Defendant, Troudi Mongi, is present.
Attorney, Michelle Glover, representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

This case settled, but the trial date of OCT-19-2009 remains for resolution of defaulted party.
